name: Jeanne d'Arc (Ruler)
description:
Jeanne heard about your endeavors with Ishtar and Ereshkigal when they were discussing what you did to them and who felt more pleasure. Feeling the obligation to stop these actions from happening again, she speaks with her Alter self seeking advice. Let's just say that she didn't get the advice she expected, yet she couldn't think of a better solution for this.

(Can this be tagged as Dead Dove? Considering the way the plot starts)

Two options for something new to export, something some people might not like

Futa Mirko & Futa Ghislaine (Your spouse wants to watch while they fuck you)

-OR-

Futa Rias & Futa Akeno (Not related to my main series)
